## Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please check the following:
- [ ] Code adheres to style guidelines (PEP 8 for Python, ES6 Modules for JS).
- [ ] Keyboard navigation and accessibility focus loops remain fully functional.
- [ ] Layout transitions and styles scale correctly across mobile, tablet, and desktop views.
- [ ] Content-Security-Policy (CSP) settings and XSS sanitizations are verified.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated with detailed release logs.
